abilities.text: Instead of deploying normally, this model may be deployed at the start of turn 2, within 2" of an ally and not on terrain.

actions.name: Wrastle
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a friendly marker within 2" of itself. If it does so, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: The Piano Played On
triggers.text: Make a Piano marker within 2" of this model.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Friction Burn
triggers.text: Target gains a Burning token.

actions.name: Gimmick
actions.effects: Target gains an Entranced token. If this action receives a raise, this model may make a Piano marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Off the Top Rope
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared if this model is at an elevation of 2 or higher. Place this model within 5", at a lower elevation. This model is dealt 1 falling damage, then it deals 1 damage to all models in base contact. Then, this model may declare an attack action, which receives a (+).

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Ingenuity
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an ally within 6" empowers a duel, it may remove a friendly Scheme marker within 2" of itself. If it does so, it may draw the card used to empower.

actions.name: Shove
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4". For each raise this action receives, move the target an additional +1".

triggers.name: Disperse the Crowd
triggers.text: An ally within 2" moves up to 4" and gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

actions.name: Solberg Shotgun
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (X)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Glory of Ridley
triggers.text: Draw a card of value 1-3 from your discard pile.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Democratic Election
actions.effects: Choose any number of models within range to heal 1. Then, deal 1 damage to the same number of models within range.
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation.

triggers.name: Reposition
triggers.text: Move this model up to 3".

actions.name: Expanding Influence
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4" toward a friendly model in its LoS.
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally or friendly minion only.
